Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

RESPONDENTS' MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO BRING TO TRIAL is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal on file.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Continued To Sep-25-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO PLANNING DEPARTMENT, AND SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF SHORT-TERM RENTALS' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Bring To Trial.

Transferred to department 501 to be heard on September 25, 2024. That department handles all rental/real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
